description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, geometric design with a predominantly dark teal and black color scheme, accented by metallic blue highlights. The front face is adorned with two tall, rectangular panels on either side and a central section that includes a recessed square and a vent-like detail below it. The structure appears to be made of a combination of metal and composite materials, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The side views reveal a very slim profile, suggesting the drawers are shallow or the object is designed for decorative or specialized storage. The surface finish is sleek and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. No visible handles or locks are present, and the overall aesthetic is minimalistic with angular, futuristic lines.
description: A modern, geometric chest of drawers in dark teal and black with metallic blue accents and a sleek, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main decorative panels, central recessed square, and vent-like detail.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extremely slim profile and lack of visible handles or protrusions.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, nearly identical to the front, with the same geometric features and color scheme.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and flat surfaces.
